mapper.select:
select mi.id, mi.staff_id, mi.content, mi.create_date, mi.read_status, mi.check_date,
si.name as staffName, si.images as staffImages,
di.dept_name, poi.name as positionName
from message_info mi left join staff_info si on (si.id = mi.staff_id) left join dept_info di on (di.id = si.dept_id) left join position_info poi on (poi.id = si.position_id) where 1 = 1
AND si.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryForm.staffName},'%')
AND mi.read_status = #{queryForm.readStatus}
order by mi.create_date desc
